input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.1.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: while the driver’s feet are touching the pedals, in side and front views, any part of the driver’s

            CONTENT:
            rule T.1.3.2: While the driver’s feet are touching the pedals, in side and front views, any part of the driver’s
T.1.3.2 While the driver’s feet are touching the pedals, in side and front views, any part of the driver’s 
feet or legs must not extend above or outside of the Major Structure of the Chassis.

final_answer: While the driver’s feet are touching the pedals, in side and front views, any part of the driver’s feet or legs must not extend above or outside of the Major Structure of the Chassis.
